PowerShell(cd c:\\repos\\pmttools; $proc = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "server_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "server_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $out = if \(Test-Path server_out.txt\) { Get-Content server_out.txt } else { "\(leer\)" }; $err = if \(Test-Path server_err.txt\) { Get-Content server_err.txt } else { "\(leer\)" }; $proc.Kill\(\); Write-Host "STDOUT: $out"; Write-Host "STDERR: $err"; Remove-Item server_out.txt, server_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1)
